# gh-pages: more clarity that 3 different versions exist

neomjs/pages repo

the top of the online examples page should make it more clear, that 3 different versions exist:
1. dev-mode
2. dist/dev
3. dist/prod

it needs to get pointed out right away, that only 1. is limited to chrome v80+
